name: huawei-cloud
description: Query Huawei Cloud resources and monitoring data via SDK

tools.name: huawei_list_ecs
tools.description: List Huawei Cloud ECS instances with pagination

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_ecs_metrics
tools.description: Get ECS instance monitoring metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_projects
tools.description: List all projects (tenants) available for the account using IAM API. Returns project IDs for all regions, and optionally filters by domain_id or specific region name.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_project_by_region
tools.description: Get project ID for a specific region. This is a convenience function that queries IAM and returns the project ID for the specified region name (e.g., 'cn-north-4').

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

tools.name: huawei_resize_cce_nodepool
tools.description: Resize (scale up or down) a CCE node pool to a specific number of nodes. Use this to add or remove nodes in a node pool.

node_count.description: Target node count (desired number of nodes after resize)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_scale_cce_workload
tools.description: Scale a CCE workload (Deployment or StatefulSet) to a specified number of replicas. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before scaling.

name.description: Name of the workload (Deployment or StatefulSet)

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm scaling. Without this, scaling will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_cluster
tools.description: Delete a CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the cluster and all its resources. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

delete_evs.description: Whether to delete associated EVS volumes (default: false)

delete_net.description: Whether to delete associated network resources (default: false)

delete_obs.description: Whether to delete associated OBS buckets (default: false)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_workload
tools.description: Delete a CCE workload (Deployment or StatefulSet). WARNING: This will delete the workload and all its pods. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

name.description: Name of the workload to delete

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_node
tools.description: Delete a node from CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the node and all its pods. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

scale_down.description: Whether to scale down pods before deleting (default: true)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_instances
tools.description: List AOM Prometheus instances and their details (including prom_http_api_endpoint)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

prom_type.description: Filter by Prometheus type - CCE, APPLICATION, default (optional)

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_addons
tools.description: Get addons (plugins) installed in a CCE cluster, returns detailed addon information including version, status, and description

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_aom_metrics
tools.description: Get Prometheus metrics from AOM using SDK to get signature, then send HTTP request directly

ak.description: Access Key ID

sk.description: Secret Access Key

project_id.description: Project ID
